candidate_definitions.text: A simple, performant and scalable Jax LLM!
Run any open-source LLMs, such as DeepSeek and Llama, as OpenAI compatible API endpoint in the cloud.
<div align="center">
The TypeScript library for building AI applications.
> ### The TypeScript library for building AI applications.
Starter examples for using Next.js and the Vercel AI SDK with Llama.cpp and ModelFusion.

This starter example shows how to use [Next.js](https://nextjs.org/), the [Vercel AI SDK](https://sdk.vercel.ai/docs), [Llama.cpp](https://github.com/ggerganov/llama.cpp) and [ModelFusion](https://modelfusion.dev) to create a ChatGPT-like AI-powered streaming chat bot.
Starter examples for using Next.js and the Vercel AI SDK with Ollama and ModelFusion.

This starter example shows how to use [Next.js](https://nextjs.org/), the [Vercel AI SDK](https://sdk.vercel.ai/docs), [Ollama](https://ollama.ai/) and [ModelFusion](https://modelfusion.dev) to create a ChatGPT-like AI-powered streaming chat bot.
Web UI for training and running open models like Gemma 4, Qwen3.5, DeepSeek, gpt-oss locally.
<h1 align="center" style="margin:0;">
Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
Fine-tuning Open-Source LLMs for Adaptive Machine Translation
Code and data for the paper [Fine-tuning Large Language Models for Adaptive Machine Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2312.12740)
GPU-accelerated Llama3.java inference in pure Java using TornadoVM.
![Java Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/java-21-blue?style=&logo=openjdk)
Enchanted is iOS and macOS app for chatting with private self hosted language models such as Llama2, Mistral or Vicuna using Ollama.
[](https://apps.apple.com/gb/app/enchanted-llm/id6474268307)
An open-source project for Windows developers to learn how to add AI with local models and APIs to Windows apps.
![WindowsAI hero image](docs/images/header.png)
Firefly: 大模型训练工具，支持训练Qwen2.5、Qwen2、Yi1.5、Phi-3、Llama3、Gemma、MiniCPM、Yi、Deepseek、Orion、Xverse、Mixtral-8x7B、Zephyr、Mistral、Baichuan2、Llma2、Llama、Qwen、Baichuan、ChatGLM2、InternLM、Ziya2、Vicuna、Bloom等大模型
<div align="left">
Lemonade helps users discover and run local AI apps by serving optimized LLMs right from their own GPUs and NPUs. Join our discord: https://discord.gg/5xXzkMu8Zk
Efficient Triton Kernels for LLM Training

Swap GPT for any LLM by changing a single line of code. Xinference lets you run open-source, speech, and multimodal models on cloud, on-prem, or your laptop — all through one unified, production-ready inference API.
<div align="center">
An open-source implementaion for fine-tuning Pixtral by MistralAI.
This repository contains a script for training Trnasformers compatible [Pixtral-12b](https://huggingface.co/mistral-community/pixtral-12b).

DevoxxGenie is a plugin for IntelliJ IDEA that uses local LLM's (Ollama, LMStudio, GPT4All, Jan and Llama.cpp) and Cloud based LLMs to help review, test, explain your project code. Latest version now also supports Spec Driven Development with CLI Runners.
Instant, controllable, local pre-trained AI models in Rust
Floneum
Run GGUF models easily with a KoboldAI UI. One File. Zero Install.

KoboldCpp is an easy-to-use AI text-generation software for GGML and GGUF models, inspired by the original **KoboldAI**. It's a single self-contained distributable that builds off **llama.cpp** and adds many additional powerful features. [Download Releases Here](https://github.c…
mistral

Python SDK for AI agent monitoring, LLM cost tracking, benchmarking, and more. Integrates with most LLMs and agent frameworks including CrewAI, Agno, OpenAI Agents SDK, Langchain, Autogen, AG2, and CamelAI
<div align="center">
Maid is a free and open source application for interfacing with llama.cpp models locally, and with Anthropic, DeepSeek, Ollama, Mistral and OpenAI models remotely.
<div align="center" id = "top">

One beautiful Ruby API for OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Bedrock, Azure, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, Ollama, VertexAI, Perplexity, Mistral, xAI, GPUStack & OpenAI compatible APIs. Agents, Chat, Vision, Audio, PDF, Images, Embeddings, Tools, Streaming & Rails integration.
<div align="center">
Chat with multiple PDFs locally
![alt text](assets/demo.png)
Low-code framework for building custom LLMs, neural networks, and other AI models
Hexabot v3 is an AI automation platform, combining workflows, actions, agents, and conversational channels in one runtime.
🚀 Pytorch Distributed native training library for LLMs/VLMs with OOTB Hugging Face support
<div align="center">
Get up and running with Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
Hexabot v3 is an AI workflow automation platform, combining workflows, actions, agents, and conversational channels in one runtime.
